title: frontend: useKubeObjectList: Fix state overwrite during render
author: ayushmaan-16

findings.description: Using the functional updater form `setListsToWatch(prev => ...)` is the correct React pattern for state updates that depend on current state — avoids the stale closure issue entirely.

Structural equality check `.some(stop => stop.cluster === it.cluster && stop.namespace === it.namespace)` is more robust than the previous reference equality — correctly handles new object instances with the same logical identity.
